history.summary: Project created
Added invisible boundary walls around rolling area
Created DicePool with multi-dice spawning and rollAll
PlayerRow + PlayerIcon, Goal/Player rows at top of viewport
BUG-001 investigation + runtime validation trap for lock mismatch
Fix BUG-001: wrong die stayed in pool after locking (generation key + remainingDiceValues)
Dice animation polish: slerp rotation on lock/unlock flights, staggered timing, casual Y rotation on split dice, roll from current position
Score counting animation in HUD and handicap Z scale-pop on PlayerIcon
Goal row transition: staggered roll-off exit and roll-in enter during round end
Tips system: contextual gameplay hints with slide-in banner, 4 tips for roll/lock/unlock phases
Layout restructure + profile groups: scaled dice, shifted rows, two-column profiles with star-score
AI lock animations: dice emerge from profile group at scale 0, fly to row slots scaling up
AI unlock animations: dice scale down 1→0, fly arc back to profile group
Pool dice exit animation: pop+shrink on round end
Pool dice spawn animation: fly from avatar with bounce+tumble on round start
Fix unlock/skip button persisting during unlock animations
UI polish: white score text, 2.5x goal star, hide unlock rings at 12-die cap
Fix 12-die cap: correct formula (pool+locked+unlocks<=12), dynamic ring/pulse visibility
GoalIndicators: colored dots under goal dice showing per-column player locks
GoalIndicators: tie handling with split wedges + outline ring for visibility
Goal column indicators + stacked dice fix
Screen transitions (CSS fades) + persisted game preferences + flow polish
Responsive CSS custom properties + HUD responsive pass with clamp() scaling
Profile layout improvements: right-aligned profiles, goal score star, settings menu text, responsive scaling
Lock/unlock/pool animation sounds: whoosh+snap on locks, rumble+pop on mitosis, spawn/exit pops
UI & score audio: score tick counting, win fanfare, die select/deselect, round start, no-match, UI clicks
Audio sync audit: mute early-return guards, settle thud volume reduction, all-settled chime bump
Roll prompt pulse animation: gentle CSS breathing effect on 'Tap to Roll' during idle phase
Strip procedural sounds to stubs — keep audio hooks, remove all sound generation
Install partykit and configure project structure
Define shared message protocol types for room lifecycle
Room server implementation: player tracking, host assignment, lifecycle management
useRoom hook: lobby connection management wrapping partyClient utilities
Lobby screen state + Play Online button in MainMenu and App routing
Lobby screen UI: create/join flow, room codes, player list, ready toggle, server-assigned colors, shared goals
Game start flow: online player names carry through to game, bot fill with unused colors
Add game action protocol types for roll, unlock, scoring, and round sync
Server game state tracking: ServerGameState/ServerPlayerState, round initialization with goal generation
Server roll handler: dice generation, auto-lock via findAutoLocks, phase transitions with duplicate guard
Server unlock/skip handlers, scoring, handicap, round transitions — full server game loop
applyOnlineRollResults store action with timing barrier for server/physics merge
Wire online roll flow: sendRollRequest on roll, physics-settle routing, lock animations for all players
Server per-player roll processing: client-authoritative values, no batching, no server random generation
Client sends physics values to server, applies own locks locally, removes batch online roll infrastructure
